title: carex × fridtzii
intro: Carex × fridtzii, also known as Fridtz's sedge, is a hybrid plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae), resulting from the cross between Carex limosa and Carex goodenowii. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carex × fridtzii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
